imports.module:
{
  isGitRepo,
  getHead,
  hasChanges,
  commitAndPush,
  changedFilesBetween,
  pullFastForward,
} from "./git-ops.js"

{
  getEntityByPath,
  getEntityByNotionId,
  upsertEntity,
  hashContent,
  updateEntityAfterSync,
  upsertBaseContent,
  getBaseContent,
  markConflict,
  clearConflict,
  listEntities,
  softDeleteEntity,
  gcDeletedEntities,
} from "../store/entities.js"

{
  lookupByPath,
  lookupByNotionId,
  registerDoc,
  computeTier,
  getRowsForDatabase,
} from "./entity-map.js"

{
  fetchBeadsIssues,
  diffBeadsState,
  mapBeadsToNotionProperties,
  mapNotionToBeadsUpdate,
  updateBeadsIssue,
  type BeadsIssue,
} from "./beads-sync.js"

methods.name: start
methods.docstring: Start the sync engine: begin watching and processing.

methods.name: stop
methods.docstring: Stop the sync engine.

methods.name: handleFileChange
methods.docstring: Handle a file change event from the watcher.

methods.name: notifyFileChange
methods.docstring: Notify the engine of a file change (from hook or external trigger).

methods.name: processQueue
methods.docstring: Process all pending operations in the queue. When a DurableQueue is configured: 1. Drain in-memory SyncQueue → enqueue into DurableQueue (deduped) 2. Claim batch from DurableQueue → process → markDone / markRetryOrDead Without a DurableQueue, falls back to the original in-memory drain-and-process.

methods.name: processQueueLegacy
methods.docstring: Legacy queue processing: drain in-memory queue and process directly.

methods.name: processQueueDurable
methods.docstring: Durable queue processing: drain in-memory ops into DurableQueue, then claim and process a batch with retry/dead-letter handling.

methods.name: processWorkItem
methods.docstring: Process a single work item from the durable queue. Dispatches to push/pull operations based on item kind.

methods.name: processPushOperation
methods.docstring: Process a single push operation. Follows the WAL protocol from PRD §6.

methods.name: pushUpdate
methods.docstring: Push updated content to an existing Notion page.

methods.name: pollNotionChanges
methods.docstring: Poll Notion for changes and enqueue pull operations. Guarded by pollInProgress to prevent overlapping polls.

methods.name: processPullOperation
methods.docstring: Process a pull operation: fetch Notion content, compare, detect conflicts.

methods.name: executePull
params: entity: { id: number; notionId: string; localPath: string }
methods.docstring: Execute a pull: write Notion content to local file, preserving frontmatter. Follows WAL protocol: pending → write file → target_written → update entity → committed → delete

methods.name: handleConflict
methods.docstring: Handle a conflict when both local and Notion have changed since last sync. Uses configured conflict strategy (three-way-merge, local-wins, notion-wins, conflict-file).

methods.name: writeConflictArtifact
methods.docstring: Write a structured conflict artifact file with base/local/remote sections. Stored in .notion-conflicts/ alongside the conflicting file. Returns the path of the artifact file.

methods.name: extractFrontmatter
methods.docstring: Extract frontmatter block from content (returns empty string if none).

methods.name: stripFrontmatter
methods.docstring: Strip frontmatter from content, returning body only.

methods.name: findProjectDir
methods.docstring: Find the project directory containing a file path. Walks up looking for directories registered as project entities.

methods.name: findDatabaseIdForRow
methods.docstring: Find the Notion database ID for a db_row entity (via its parent entity or frontmatter).

methods.name: syncFile
methods.docstring: Force sync of a specific file (for manual trigger / hook notification).

methods.name: pollBeadsChanges
methods.docstring: Poll beads issues for changes and sync to Notion. Compares current state against stored snapshot to detect changes.

methods.name: handleLocalDeletion
methods.docstring: Handle soft-delete when a local file is removed. Marks entity as deleted, updates Notion page status.

methods.name: runGC
methods.docstring: Run garbage collection for soft-deleted entities older than retention period. Default retention: 30 days (aligned with Notion trash retention).

methods.name: pushDbRowUpdate
methods.docstring: Push a database row update: parse frontmatter → update Notion properties + body.

methods.name: pullDbRow
params: entity: { id: number; notionId: string; localPath: string }
methods.docstring: Pull a database row from Notion: fetch properties + blocks → write file with frontmatter.

methods.name: enqueueRemotePull
methods.docstring: Enqueue a remote pull operation, routing to DurableQueue when available.

methods.name: initGitCursor
methods.docstring: Initialize the git cursor to the current HEAD. Called once at startup when git is enabled.

methods.name: scanGitForChanges
methods.docstring: Scan git for committed changes since the last processed commit. Enqueues local_entity_push work items for changed markdown files that have a notion_id in their frontmatter.

methods.name: autoCommitIfNeeded
methods.docstring: Auto-commit and push changes after webhook-triggered pulls. Only runs when git.auto_commit is enabled.

methods.name: enqueueReconcile
methods.docstring: Enqueue a full reconciliation sync. Used by the periodic timer and webhook server when scope is unknown.

methods.name: getDurableQueue
methods.docstring: Get the durable queue instance (for external consumers like webhook server or MCP tools).

methods.name: getStatus
